Chapter 1 Sales Data Analysis (2015–2020) 1.1 Learning Outcomes Analyse multi-region sales data Apply SUM, AVERAGE, and Growth formulas Create charts for comparison and trends Perform sorting and filtering 1.2 Dataset Region Year Sales North 2015 42000 North 2016 46800 North 2017 51200 North 2018 55600 North 2019 60100 North 2020 65400 South 2015 35000 South 2016 38500 South 2017 41200 South 2018 44800 South 2019 48500 South 2020 53200 East 2015 28000 East 2016 31200 East 2017 35600 East 2018 39400 East 2019 43800 East 2020 49100 West 2015 32000 West 2016 35800 West 2017 40100 West 2018 44200 West 2019 49600 West 2020 55300 1.2.1  Download Excel File Download Sales Data Excel 1.3 Step 1: Data Entry & Formulas 1.3.1 Structure in Excel Column Description A Region B–G Sales (2015–2020) H Total I Average J Growth % 1.3.2 Formulas Used Calculation Formula Total =SUM(B4:G4) Average =AVERAGE(B4:G4) Growth % =(G4-B4)/B4 1.3.3 Grand Total Row Calculation Formula Year-wise Total =SUM(B4:B7) Overall Total =SUM(H4:H7) Avg of Avg =AVERAGE(I4:I7) 1.4 Step 2: Chart Creation 1.4.1 Recommended Charts Line Chart → Trend over years Column Chart → Region comparison 1.4.2 Diagram flowchart TD A[Select Data] --> B[Insert Tab] B --> C[Choose Chart] 1.4.3 Insight North region has highest sales All regions show upward growth trend 1.5 Step 3: Chart Formatting Title: Regional Sales Trend (2015–2020) X-axis: Year Y-axis: Sales Legend: Regions 1.6 Step 4: Interpretation Sales across all regions show steady growth. North region leads consistently, while East shows gradual improvement. Overall performance indicates positive business expansion. 1.7 Step 5: Sorting 1.7.1 Example Sort by 2020 Sales → Identify top region Sort by Growth % → Identify fastest growing region 1.8 Step 6: Advanced Filter 1.8.1 Example Criteria Region North OR Growth % >0.5 1.9 Final Output Multi-region Excel analysis Charts showing trends and comparison Summary interpretation 1.10 Conclusion This experiment demonstrates how Excel tools can be used effectively for business data analysis, visualization, and decision-making.
